<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover" />
<title>I go, you go!</title>

<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="I go, you go!">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<style>
:root{
  --bg:#5f80f2;
  --bg2:#4f70df;
  --white:#f3f0e9;
  --dark:#223154;
  --ring:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  --ring-dots:rgba(255,255,255,0.24);
  --glow:rgba(255,255,255,0.16);
  --shadow:rgba(25,37,77,0.16);
}

*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html,body{height:100%}

body{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg),var(--bg2));
  font-family:Impact, Haettenschweiler,"Arial Narrow Bold",Arial,sans-serif;
  color:var(--white);
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:background 220ms ease,color 220ms ease;
}

body.down-mode{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--white),#ebe7e0);
  color:var(--bg2);
}

.app{
  position:relative;
  width:100%;
  max-width:430px;
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:32px 22px max(40px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  isolation:isolate;
}

.rings{
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  pointer-events:none;
  z-index:0;
}

.circle{
  position:absolute;
  border-radius:50%;
  pointer-events:none;
  transform-origin:center;
  transition:transform 220ms ease, opacity 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease;
}

.circle.big{
  width:min(92vw,390px);
  height:min(92vw,390px);
  border:2px solid var(--ring);
}
.circle.mid{
  width:min(72vw,305px);
  height:min(72vw,305px);
  border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);
}
.circle.small{
  width:min(60vw,250px);
  height:min(60vw,250px);
  border:4px dotted var(--ring-dots);
}

body.down-mode .circle.big{border-color:rgba(95,128,242,0.20)}
body.down-mode .circle.mid{border-color:rgba(95,128,242,0.16)}
body.down-mode .circle.small{border-color:rgba(95,128,242,0.26)}

.app.pulse .circle.big{animation:ringPulseBig 1.6s ease-in-out infinite}
.app.pulse .circle.mid{animation:ringPulseMid 1.6s ease-in-out infinite 0.08s}
.app.pulse .circle.small{animation:ringPulseSmall 1.6s ease-in-out infinite 0.16s}

@keyframes ringPulseBig{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.78}
  50%{transform:scale(1.025);opacity:1}
}
@keyframes ringPulseMid{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.7}
  50%{transform:scale(1.035);opacity:.95}
}
@keyframes ringPulseSmall{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.62}
  50%{transform:scale(1.05);opacity:.9}
}

.content{
  position:relative;
  z-index:2;
  width:100%;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
}

.center{
  width:100%;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:34px;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
}

.title{
  font-size:clamp(3rem,11vw,4.2rem);
  line-height:.92;
  letter-spacing:.02em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:color 220ms ease;
}

.timer-wrap{
  width:100%;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:center;
  margin-top:8px;
}

.timer-svg{
  width:min(100%, 380px);
  height:auto;
  overflow:visible;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 26px rgba(26,40,83,0.15));
  transition:filter 220ms ease;
}

body.down-mode .timer-svg{
  filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 26px rgba(95,128,242,0.08));
}

.timer-char{
  font-family:Impact, Haettenschweiler, "Arial Narrow Bold", Arial, sans-serif;
  font-weight:900;
  font-size:102px;
  fill:currentColor;
  text-anchor:middle;
  dominant-baseline:middle;
}

.subtitle{
  font-size:clamp(1rem,4vw,1.35rem);
  line-height:1;
  letter-spacing:.04em;
  margin-top:16px;
  opacity:.9;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:color 220ms ease;
}

.btn-wrap{
  width:100%;
  position:relative;
  z-index:3;
}

.btn{
  width:100%;
  height:118px;
  border-radius:999px;
  border:none;
  background:var(--white);
  color:var(--dark);
  font-family:inherit;
  font-size:clamp(2.5rem,10vw,4rem);
  line-height:1;
  cursor:pointer;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  box-shadow:0 16px 36px var(--shadow);
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:transform 140ms ease, background 220ms ease, color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease;
  touch-action:manipulation;
  -webkit-appearance:none;
  appearance:none;
}

.btn:active{transform:scale(.985)}

.btn.down{
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--white);
  box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(95,128,242,0.28);
}

.btn .label{
  display:inline-block;
  transition:transform 220ms ease, opacity 180ms ease;
}
.btn.morph .label{animation:labelPop 280ms ease}

@keyframes labelPop{
  0%{transform:scale(.86) translateY(8px);opacity:.25}
  60%{transform:scale(1.06) translateY(-2px);opacity:1}
  100%{transform:scale(1) translateY(0);opacity:1}
}

.footer{
  position:absolute;
  left:22px;
  bottom:max(22px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
  z-index:2;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,3rem);
  line-height:.9;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  transition:color 220ms ease;
}

.glow{
  position:absolute;
  width:70%;
  height:24%;
  bottom:8%;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, var(--glow) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 35%, rgba(255,255,255,0) 72%);
  filter:blur(24px);
  pointer-events:none;
  z-index:1;
  transition:opacity 220ms ease, background 220ms ease;
}

body.down-mode .glow{
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(95,128,242,0.12) 0%, rgba(95,128,242,0.05) 35%, rgba(95,128,242,0) 72%);
}

@media (max-width:380px){
  .btn{height:104px}
  .center{margin-bottom:28px}
  .subtitle{margin-top:14px}
  .timer-char{font-size:94px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app" id="app">
  <div class="rings" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="circle big"></div>
    <div class="circle mid"></div>
    <div class="circle small"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="glow" aria-hidden="true"></div>

  <div class="content">
    <div class="center">
      <div class="title" id="title">START!</div>
      <div class="timer-wrap">
        <svg id="timer" class="timer-svg" viewBox="0 0 422 115" aria-label="00:00:00" role="img">
          <text id="t0" class="timer-char" x="36"  y="60">0</text>
          <text id="t1" class="timer-char" x="90"  y="60">0</text>
          <text class="timer-char" x="135" y="60">:</text>
          <text id="t2" class="timer-char" x="184" y="60">0</text>
          <text id="t3" class="timer-char" x="238" y="60">0</text>
          <text class="timer-char" x="283" y="60">:</text>
          <text id="t4" class="timer-char" x="332" y="60">0</text>
          <text id="t5" class="timer-char" x="386" y="60">0</text>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div id="status" class="subtitle">TAP TO START</div>
    </div>

    <div class="btn-wrap">
      <button id="btn" class="btn" type="button" aria-label="I go">
        <span class="label" id="btnLabel">I GO</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">I GO<br>YOU GO</div>
</div>

<script>
const body = document.body;
const app = document.getElementById("app");
const timerEl = document.getElementById("timer");
const btn = document.getElementById("btn");
const btnLabel = document.getElementById("btnLabel");
const statusEl = document.getElementById("status");
const titleEl = document.getElementById("title");
const digits = [
  document.getElementById("t0"),
  document.getElementById("t1"),
  document.getElementById("t2"),
  document.getElementById("t3"),
  document.getElementById("t4"),
  document.getElementById("t5")
];

let state = "idle";
let startTime = 0;
let elapsed = 0;
let downFrom = 0;
let raf = null;
let audioCtx = null;

function pad(n){
  return String(n).padStart(2,"0");
}

function format(ms){
  const clamped = Math.max(0, ms);
  const m = Math.floor(clamped / 60000);
  const s = Math.floor((clamped % 60000) / 1000);
  const hs = Math.floor((clamped % 1000) / 10);
  return `${pad(m)}:${pad(s)}:${pad(hs)}`;
}

function render(ms){
  const value = format(ms);
  const chars = [value[0], value[1], value[3], value[4], value[6], value[7]];
  digits.forEach((el, i) => el.textContent = chars[i]);
  timerEl.setAttribute("aria-label", value);
}

function setButtonText(text){
  btn.classList.remove("morph");
  void btn.offsetWidth;
  btnLabel.textContent = text;
  btn.classList.add("morph");
  setTimeout(() => btn.classList.remove("morph"), 320);
}

function stopLoop(){
  if (raf !== null){
    cancelAnimationFrame(raf);
    raf = null;
  }
}

function setMode(mode){
  if (mode === "down"){
    body.classList.add("down-mode");
  } else {
    body.classList.remove("down-mode");
  }
}

function setIdle(){
  state = "idle";
  elapsed = 0;
  downFrom = 0;
  stopLoop();
  render(0);
  titleEl.textContent = "START!";
  statusEl.textContent = "TAP TO START";
  setButtonText("I GO");
  btn.classList.remove("down");
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "I go");
  app.classList.remove("pulse");
  setMode("idle");
}

function startUp(){
  state = "up";
  startTime = performance.now();
  titleEl.textContent = "START!";
  statusEl.textContent = "COUNTING UP";
  setButtonText("YOU GO");
  btn.classList.remove("down");
  btn.disabled = false;
  btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "You go");
  app.classList.add("pulse");
  setMode("up");
  tickUp();
}

function tickUp(){
  if (state !== "up") return;
  elapsed = performance.now() - startTime;
  render(elapsed);
  raf = requestAnimationFrame(tickUp);
}

function startDown(){
  state = "down";
  downFrom = elapsed;
  startTime = performance.now();
  titleEl.textContent = "GO!";
  statusEl.textContent = "COUNTING DOWN";
  btn.classList.add("down");
  btn.disabled = true;
  app.classList.add("pulse");
  setMode("down");
  tickDown();
}

function tickDown(){
  if (state !== "down") return;
  const t = performance.now() - startTime;
  const remain = downFrom - t;

  if (remain <= 0){
    render(0);
    titleEl.textContent = "DONE!";
    statusEl.textContent = "TIME IS UP";
    app.classList.remove("pulse");
    playAlarm();
    setTimeout(setIdle, 700);
    return;
  }

  render(remain);
  raf = requestAnimationFrame(tickDown);
}

function ensureAudio(){
  if (!audioCtx){
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  }
  if (audioCtx.state === "suspended"){
    audioCtx.resume();
  }
  return audioCtx;
}

function playAlarm(){
  const ctx = ensureAudio();
  const now = ctx.currentTime;
  const notes = [880, 1174.66, 1318.51];

  notes.forEach((freq, i) => {
    const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
    const gain = ctx.createGain();
    osc.type = "triangle";
    osc.frequency.value = freq;
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now + i * 0.18);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.18, now + i * 0.18 + 0.02);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + i * 0.18 + 0.16);
    osc.connect(gain).connect(ctx.destination);
    osc.start(now + i * 0.18);
    osc.stop(now + i * 0.18 + 0.18);
  });

  if ("vibrate" in navigator){
    navigator.vibrate([120, 70, 120]);
  }
}

btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  ensureAudio();

  if (state === "idle"){
    startUp();
  } else if (state === "up"){
    stopLoop();
    startDown();
  }
});

render(0);
setMode("idle");
</script>
</body>
</html>
